prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your personal finance forward
items: Calculate your current net worth by listing all assets and liabilities
Create a detailed monthly budget tracking all income sources and expenses
Gather and organize all financial documents in one secure location
Research and compare high-yield savings accounts for your emergency fund
Set up automatic transfers to build your emergency fund systematically
Review and understand your current credit report from all three major bureaus
